name: taskflow
description: Multi-tenant Project Management SaaS with Subscription & Feature Entitlement System

scripts.install:all: npm run backend:install && npm run frontend:install
scripts.build:all: npm run backend:build && npm run frontend:build
scripts.db:start: docker run --name taskflow-db -e POSTGRES_USER=postgres -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres -e POSTGRES_DB=taskflow -p 5432:5432 -d postgres:16-alpine
scripts.db:stop: docker stop taskflow-db && docker rm taskflow-db
scripts.db:setup: cd backend && npm run migrate && npm run seed
